gt_sql: SELECT t1.name FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t2.season = '2015/2016' GROUP BY t1.name ORDER BY COUNT(t2.id) DESC LIMIT 4
pred_sql:
SELECT League.name
FROM Match
JOIN League ON Match.league_id = League.id
WHERE Match.season = '2015/2016'
GROUP BY League.name
ORDER BY COUNT(Match.id) DESC
LIMIT 4
question: Which top 4 leagues had the most games in the 2015-2016 season?
